rules.title: Common Equity Tier 1 Minimum Ratio
rules.text: Banking organizations must maintain a minimum Common Equity Tier 1 capital ratio of 4.5% of risk-weighted assets.

rules.title: Capital Conservation Buffer
rules.text: An additional capital conservation buffer of 2.5% is required on top of minimum risk-based capital ratios.

rules.title: Supplementary Leverage Ratio (GSIBs)
rules.text: Global systemically important banks must maintain a supplementary leverage ratio of at least 5.0%, inclusive of a 2.0% buffer.

rules.title: Liquidity Coverage Ratio
rules.text: Covered banking organizations must maintain high-quality liquid assets sufficient to meet net cash outflows over a 30-day stress period, expressed as a minimum LCR of 100%.
